expectations.text: Uses the single feature evaluation format, not the full RICE framework
expectations.evidence: Uses an ad-hoc pros/cons format ('Factors to Consider: For/Against'), not the structured single feature evaluation template. No structured fields for Request source, Frequency, User problem, etc.

expectations.text: Includes opportunity cost — what does NOT get built if we build this?
expectations.evidence: Mentions '3 sprints is not trivial — that's 6 weeks of dev time' under cons, but does not name the specific items that would be displaced. No explicit opportunity cost analysis.

expectations.text: Frequency of request is assessed (one customer vs pattern)
expectations.evidence: Mentions 'Building for one customer's demand can set a bad precedent' and 'Check if other customers have mentioned Slack interest' — recognizes the single-customer concern.

expectations.text: Confidence in value is rated with basis
expectations.evidence: No confidence rating. The output says 'I'd lean toward building it' without rating confidence level or providing structured basis.

expectations.text: Recommendation is one of BUILD / DEFER / DECLINE / DISCOVERY SPIKE
expectations.evidence: Recommendation is 'Build an MVP (1 sprint), validate demand' — a reasonable approach but not framed as one of the four structured options.
